text: Development board with an ARM Cortex-M7 microcontroller, CAN, SPI and UART. No AI accelerator is included.
Industrial sensor gateway with Cortex-A53 application processor and Ethernet. BLE footprint is unpopulated in the export configuration.
Enterprise router with 25 Gb Ethernet interfaces and IPsec VPN with customer-managed keys.
Managed Ethernet switch with 48 10GbE ports. Encryption capability is not specified.
Network security appliance provides AES encryption, TLS offload, HSM key storage and customer key management.
Rack server with general-purpose processors, DDR5 memory and PCIe Gen5 slots. No GPU or AI accelerator included.
PCIe accelerator card with an integrated NPU rated at 96 TOPS and HBM3 memory.
GPU server with four graphics processing units rated at 120 TFLOPS and HBM3.
NPU module delivers 48 TOPS inference performance through PCIe Gen4.
Edge inference appliance includes an NPU rated at 32 TOPS in the production configuration.
Wireless radio transceiver module with antenna connector and OFDM modulation from 2.4 GHz to 5.8 GHz.
Telecommunications appliance with 100GbE Ethernet network interfaces and optical transport ports.
Rackmount storage appliance with solid state drives and Ethernet management.
FPGA programmable logic board with 500k logic cells and 24 SERDES transceivers.
Evaluation kit for an ARM Cortex-M microcontroller. The optional accelerator module is available separately and is not included.
Product family overview: some SKUs offer an optional NPU; the exact export configuration is unknown.
Software-only network monitoring application. No supplied hardware and no cryptographic implementation details.
Security firmware image supports signed firmware updates and secure boot verification.
Preliminary product brief. Technical configuration to be confirmed.
